NAOKI HAYASHI
PROJECTSLABABOUT

ABOUT

1996-ongoing | Industrial / Computational Designer | Prototype

Naoki Hayashi is a multi-disciplinary designer based in Japan, with a passion for industrial design, computational design and digital fabrication.

Expertise

Industrial design
Product visualization
Computational design
Digital fabrication / Prototyping

Educations

2025: Fab Academy Graduate
2018: B.Des, Nagoya City University School of Design and Architecture

Awards

2023: Good Design Award Winner
2019: Asia Design Prize Winner
2016: Konica Minolta Social Design Award Winner
